steps.t: Hávar, the Metalsmith's Guild-leader, is in the Guild-hall in Thorin's Hall. The Master of Crafting Guilds has instructed you to speak with Hávar to l…
Reifnir is in the Metalsmith's Guild-hall in Thorin's Hall. Hávar has directed you to speak with Reifnir to look at what recipes he sells.
Lar is in the Metalsmith's Guild-hall in Thorin's Hall. Hávar has directed you to speak with Lar to look at what recipes he sells.
